positive: A central, highly stylized geometric pattern illustration featuring interconnected elements inspired by deep-sea bioluminescence and celestial constellations. The design should incorporate clean, stylized silhouettes of abstract marine flora and fauna, overlaid with vibrant, radiating lines representing stellar energy. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, bioluminescent teal, and pops of luminous yellow. The composition must be perfectly balanced and tileable, ensuring strong visual impact suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Style: Clean graphic vector art, Art Deco influence, minimalist sci-fi aesthetic. High detail, ultra-resolution, perfect symmetry, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blur, noise, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, poorly rendered, asymmetrical, distracting elements, excessive realism, photorealism, logos, trademarks, celebrity, copyrighted, character, writing
